title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Huawei announced Tau Scaling Law to compete in the hardware and semiconductor race between China and the USA. The video discusses how EUV and DUV lithography, along with packaging and logic folding, are key technologies shaping industry competition.
